ACCURACY_ATTESTATION 

LABEL: Practitioner's Accuracy of Attestation 

DESCRIPTION: Practitioner's accuracy of attestation. This variable addresses the question, “Has the practitioner 
attested to accuracy?” 

SHORT NAME: ACCURACY_ATTESTATION 

LONG NAME: ACCURACY_ATTESTATION 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Visit 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 

COMMENT: —
